brand_identity.name: AgencyOS
brand_identity.visual_motif: Clean lines, subtle depth, rigorous grids

primary.description: Deep Electric Indigo - Professional yet energetic

secondary.description: Cool Light Gray - For secondary actions

accent.description: Emerald Green - For success and financial growth metrics

destructive.description: Red - For errors and critical alerts

rules: Primary color is reserved for the main call-to-action (Create, Save, Send).
Use 'accent' color sparingly for financial positive trends.
Backgrounds should be slightly off-white (#f9fafb) to distinguish from white cards.

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6
dashboard_grid.rules: Widgets should snap to the grid. Use col-span-2 for charts, col-span-1 for summary cards.

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r bg-white z-30 hidden lg:block

card_style.classes: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-6

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none ring-offset-background

inputs.classes: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.container: w-full overflow-auto rounded-lg border bg-white shadow-sm

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds; use them only for subtle highlights or active states.
All currency must be formatted as EUR (€).
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end agency management system. Use the provided color palette and typography strictly. When creating the dashboard, prioritize the 'Bento Grid' layout. For the 'Contracts' section, ensure the file upload area is prominent and uses a dashed border style. For 'Invoices', focus on clear status badges (Paid = Green, Pending = Yellow, Overdue = Red). Use the 'Plus Jakarta Sans' font for all headings to give it a distinct agency feel. Do not ask for user clarification; assume best practices for a Web Agency context.
